$meta.purpose: Machine-readable design rules for AI-driven design generation

moodSummary: Cloudflare Support Portal: A clean, neutral grey canvas with high information density. Brand identity is reinforced with a single, highly saturated brand blue for interactive commands, Cloudflare orange for logos/visual cues, and dark charcoal for text. Motion is used with restraint for delightful state transitions.

principles.name: High Information Density
principles.rule: Prioritize text-xs as the default typography size for labels, metadata, lists, and secondary buttons. Spacing uses snug paddings (p-3/p-4) and tight gaps (gap-1.5/gap-2) to display maximal content on screen without clutter.
principles.evidence: text-xs is used 254 times (the most frequent text size utility) and p-4/px-4 are the most frequent spacing values in the codebase.

principles.name: Vivid Accent on Neutral Base
principles.rule: All primary actions, active navigation states, links, and input focus rings use the primary brand blue (rgb(0, 81, 195) in light / oklch(0.922 0 0) in dark). Backgrounds, borders, and text are kept in neutral greys to make the interactive accent stand out.
principles.evidence: --primary maps to bright blue, while backgrounds/borders are neutral grays. text-muted-foreground is used 292 times to tone down non-essential text.

principles.name: Bipolar Dark/Light Parity
principles.rule: Every panel and component must support light and dark modes symmetrically. Avoid hardcoded light-only or dark-only color values, using semantic colors (bg-card, border-border, text-foreground) mapped through CSS custom properties.
principles.evidence: globals.css maps root and .dark properties comprehensively for all colors including cards, inputs, borders, and sidebar states.

doList: Lead layout hierarchy through font weights (bold, semibold) and spacing, not font sizes.
Pair semantic surface tokens with their respective foreground tokens (e.g. bg-primary with text-primary-foreground).
Use font-mono for code strings, resource IDs, dates, and keyboard shortcut indicators.
dontList: Don't introduce additional bright accent colors; restrict accent colors to primary blue and Cloudflare orange.
Don't use font sizes larger than text-sm for general body paragraphs or form labels.
Don't apply heavy shadow offsets; keep cards sitting flat or using shadow-sm.
